sourceFamily: NH-5 Scavenger's Guide to Droids battle/security droid damage profiles

canonPolicy.authority: Printed/sourcebook statblock attack rows are canonical for imported NPC play-mode attacks.
canonPolicy.rowSemantics: Each record represents one printed statblock attack/action row, not a generic equipment definition.
canonPolicy.unmatchedRows: Importer consumers must leave unmatched rows reference-only/manual; do not infer formulas from item names.
canonPolicy.riders: Condition-track movement and similar non-HP effects are stored as riders/tags outside base HP damage.

notes: This batch covers Scavenger's Guide to Droids 4th-degree battle/security droid statblocks where a printed attack row and damage expression are directly visible in repository statblock text.

Repository statblock text for this batch uses a wiki-mirrored "Protocol Format" presentation (System Actions with Swift Action costs) rather than the classic Melee/Ranged inline statblock line format used by earlier NH batches; page-level sourcebook confirmation is still required before any row here is marked verified.

Rows use the same canonical damage fields as data/combat/damage-profiles.schema.json and the NH-2 schema. Printed statblock attack totals are intentionally not copied into item attackBonus to avoid double counting.

weapon.uuid/base* fields are compendium identity metadata only; formula.printed remains authoritative even where compendium dice counts differ from the printed row (see formula.mode "printed-override" rows).

evidence: GX1-Series Battle Droid System Actions list "Blaster Rifle Attack" as a ranged attack at +11 dealing 3d10+4 points of damage.
"Rapid Shot" is listed as a second ranged System Action at +9 dealing 4d10+4 points of damage; modeled as a variant of the same weapon.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

sourceRefs.note: GX1-Series Battle Droid Blaster Rifle Attack row.

components.label: Blaster Rifle Attack with Rapid Shot

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

evidence: FLTCH-Series Battle Droid System Actions list "Claw Attack" as a melee attack at +13 dealing 1d6+8 points of damage.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

No damage type is printed for this integrated claw attachment; slashing is used per the existing claw-attack typing convention already applied to other droid/beast claw rows in this dataset (e.g. vindinax-claw).

sourceRefs.note: FLTCH-Series Battle Droid Claw Attack row.

evidence: FLTCH-Series Battle Droid System Actions list "Heavy Blaster Rifle Attack" as a ranged attack at +10 dealing 3d10+2 points of damage.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

Compendium base for Heavy Blaster Rifle is 3d12 (weapons-rifles); the printed statblock formula is 3d10+2, a different die count than the compendium base. The dice mismatch is not mechanically obvious, so formula.printed is kept as sole authority and no base/delta relationship is claimed. weapon.uuid is retained only as an exact-name identity match, not as a formula derivation.

sourceRefs.note: FLTCH-Series Battle Droid Heavy Blaster Rifle Attack row; printed dice differ from current compendium Heavy Blaster Rifle base (3d12) and are preserved as printed.

records.name: Missile Launcher Attack

evidence: FLTCH-Series Battle Droid System Actions list "Missile Launcher Attack" as a ranged attack at +9 dealing 6d6+2 points of damage in a 2-square radius.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.
No damage type is printed; kinetic is inherited from the matched compendium Missile Launcher base item as reference metadata only.

sourceRefs.note: FLTCH-Series Battle Droid Missile Launcher Attack row.

notes: FLTCH-Series Battle Droid also has a "Zero-Range Attack" (Grab/Grapple with Claw Appendage followed by an immediate arm-mounted Blaster Rifle attack) and a "Nightmare" intimidate action; both are intentionally omitted from this batch as compound/non-damage actions outside straightforward single weapon-row modeling.

evidence: DT-16 "Destructor" Battle Droid System Actions list "Rapid Shot" as a ranged attack at +2 dealing 4d8 points of damage; no underlying weapon name or damage type is printed.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.
The statblock names this System Action "Rapid Shot" without identifying an underlying weapon model or damage type, so no compendium UUID or damage type is claimed.

sourceRefs.note: DT-16 "Destructor" Battle Droid Rapid Shot row.

evidence: Droideka Mk II Destroyer Droid System Actions list "Blaster Barrage" as two ranged attacks at +10, each dealing 5d8+2 points of damage.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.
Two separate attacks, each at this bonus.

No damage type is printed; "energy" is used because the action is explicitly named as a blaster attack, matching standard SWSE blaster-weapon typing. No specific compendium item name is printed for this integrated twin-blaster weapon, so no UUID is claimed.

This System Action makes two separate ranged attacks at the printed bonus, each independently rolling this damage; the schema does not yet model an explicit attack-count field, so this is recorded as a single-attack component with the multi-attack behavior noted here.

sourceRefs.note: Droideka Mk II Destroyer Droid Blaster Barrage row.

Compendium base for Blaster Rifle is 3d10 (weapons-rifles); the printed statblock formula is 3d8+4, a different die count. The dice mismatch is not mechanically obvious, so formula.printed is kept as sole authority. weapon.uuid is retained only as an exact-name identity match.

records.name: Rapid Shot

evidence: E522 Assassin Droid System Actions list "Rapid Shot" as a ranged attack at +5 "with either its Heavy Repeating Blaster or its Ion Rifle", dealing either 4d10+3 points of damage or 4d8+3 points of Ion damage depending on the weapon used.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

sourceRefs.note: E522 Assassin Droid Rapid Shot row (Heavy Repeating Blaster option).

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

The statblock explicitly presents two alternate weapon options for this same System Action; the Ion Rifle option is modeled as a variant. The Droid's "Needler" (used only for its Paralyze Opponent rider effect) has no printed damage formula and is intentionally omitted.

evidence: SD-9 Battle Droid System Actions list "Heavy Repeating Blaster Attack" as a ranged Autofire attack at +15 dealing 3d10+10 points of damage in a 2x2-square area, with half damage on a miss.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

sourceRefs.note: SD-9 Battle Droid Heavy Repeating Blaster Attack row.

records.name: Twin Blaster Burst

evidence: SD-9 Battle Droid System Actions list "Twin Blaster Burst" as a ranged attack at +20 dealing 3d12+10 points of damage with a 1-square splash.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.
No damage type is printed; "energy" is used because the action is explicitly named as a blaster attack. No specific compendium item name is printed for this integrated weapon, so no UUID is claimed.

sourceRefs.note: SD-9 Battle Droid Twin Blaster Burst row.

notes: SD-9 Battle Droid also has non-damage "Defense Mode" and "Delay Damage" System Actions; both are intentionally omitted from this batch.

evidence: SD-X Stealth Battle Droid System Actions list "Blaster Rifle Attack" as a ranged attack at +9 dealing 3d8+4 points of damage.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

Compendium base for Blaster Rifle is 3d10 (weapons-rifles); the printed statblock formula is 3d8+4, a different die count. The dice mismatch is not mechanically obvious, so formula.printed is kept as sole authority. weapon.uuid is retained only as an exact-name identity match.

sourceRefs.note: SD-X Stealth Battle Droid Blaster Rifle Attack row; printed dice differ from current compendium Blaster Rifle base (3d10) and are preserved as printed.

evidence: SD-X Stealth Battle Droid System Actions list "Concealed Vibrodaggers" as a melee attack at +10 dealing 4d4+7 points of damage.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

Printed formula (4d4+7) is double the compendium Vibrodagger base dice (2d4) plus a flat modifier, consistent with the printed name referring to a pair of concealed vibrodaggers used together; the extra dice are preserved as a printed delta, not reverse-engineered.

sourceRefs.note: SD-X Stealth Battle Droid Concealed Vibrodaggers row.

evidence: TC-SC Infiltration Droid System Actions list "Dastardly Blade" as a melee attack at +0 dealing 1d4 points of damage; if the target is denied its Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense, the target moves -1 step on the Condition Track.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.
No underlying weapon name or damage type is printed for this System Action.

riders.notes: If the target is denied its Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense, it moves -1 step on the Condition Track on a hit.

sourceRefs.note: TC-SC Infiltration Droid Dastardly Blade row.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

evidence: Infiltrator-Series Droid System Actions list "Penetrate Hull" as a melee attack at +13 dealing 2d6+4 points of damage, or 16 points of damage against the hull of a Vehicle or against solid walls and doors.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

The statblock also prints an alternate flat 16 points of damage "against the hull of a Vehicle or against solid walls and doors"; that object/vehicle-hull interaction is out of scope for this character-scale weapon-damage batch and is preserved here only as a note, not as a modeled mechanic.

sourceRefs.note: Infiltrator-Series Droid Penetrate Hull row.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

evidence: DE Training Droid System Actions list "Rapier Thrust" as a melee attack at +4 dealing 1d8+4 points of damage.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.
No compendium item named "Rapier" exists in the scanned weapon packs, so no UUID is claimed. Damage type is set to piercing per standard thrust-blade convention (no explicit damage type is printed).

sourceRefs.note: DE Training Droid Rapier Thrust row.

evidence: YVH Battle Droid System Actions list "Blaster Cannon Attack" as a ranged attack at +10 dealing 3d12+4 points of damage as an Area Attack that also has a chance to hit enemies adjacent to the target; on a miss, the attack deals half damage to the target and no damage to adjacent enemies.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

sourceRefs.note: YVH Battle Droid Blaster Cannon Attack row.

evidence: YVH Battle Droid System Actions list "Maximum Firepower" as its Blaster Cannon fired at +10 dealing 4d12+4 points of damage, using the same Area Attack rules as Blaster Cannon Attack.

notes: Printed attack total is preserved only for source/audit display and is not written to item.system.attackBonus.

sourceRefs.note: YVH Battle Droid Maximum Firepower row.

records.name: Vibroblade Attack
